name: Chat & Messaging App
description: Bubble UI (left/right alignment). Typing indicators. Read receipts (✓✓). Image/file preview. Emoji reactions. Group avatars. Online status dots. Swipe-to-reply.

psychology_triggers.name: Social Proof

psychology_triggers.anti_pattern: Ignoring Social Proof leads to high drop-off rates in this specific industry.
